name: Maple Glazed Carrots
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the carrots and cut into sticks.
2. Pour the orange juice into a 4-cup microwave-safe dish.
3. Heat for 1 minute at high.
4. Add the carrots and orange rind to the dish. Stir to coat with orange juice.
5. Cover and microwave for 8-9 minutes at high, stirring once.
6. Add remaining ingredients (maple syrup, mace or nutmeg, butter).
7. Microwave uncovered for 2 minutes at high, stirring.
8. Check for doneness; if needed, cook an additional 1 minute at high.
